zone_6b_notes: Direct sow after last frost (late April/early May in Zone 6b) or start 2–3 weeks indoors. Fast-growing in Missouri summers — can produce fruit in 50 days. Plant 2–3 plants maximum for a family; they are prolific. Powdery mildew is common by late summer — choose mildew-resistant varieties.
water: consistent — 1 inch per week minimum; water at base to reduce mildew
